channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Manhole cover loose make bad noise every time vehicle goes over it, 1st July
item.description:
On road outside Wingmoor lodge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass. Not been cut since winter, 1st July
item.description:
Public right of way north of stoke orchard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Zura Drive, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untidy grass along cerb, 30th June
item.description:
Along Meadow Way, looks unkept and needs weed removal and stuff to stop them returning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadow Way, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reportable, noxious plant, 30th June
item.description:
N L/H verge when heading towards Swindon Village, Just before the railway bridge. First reported 10th June - still there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hyde Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Need to clean, 30th June
item.description:
Clean the streets of all these badly parked cars

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sure not parked?, 30th June
item.description:
Must be abandoned!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 141, Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham

item.title: Crossing problem, 30th June
item.description:
Very difficult to cross the road here with all these parked cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 1, Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury

item.title: Lines required, 30th June
item.description:
Could we have some double yellow lines please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 1, Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury

item.title: Cars not using the car parks, 30th June
item.description:
Instead choosing to park dangerously on the main road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham

item.title: 10 inch pothole on Example St, near post box, 30th June
item.description:
No, not really. Just about the lack of double yellow lines again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury

item.title: Double yellow lines, 30th June
item.description:

item.title: Tree cut back block pavement, 30th June

item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Double yellow lines missing, 30th June
item.description:
Cars parked near bends, on junctions, in front of drop kerbs on a daily basis.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 3, Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury

item.title: Bad parking, 30th June
item.description:
Not sure if you're aware, but the parking along this road is awful. Could probably use some double yellow lines!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 3, Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury

item.title: Hooray! The double yellow lines have been painted!, 30th June
